confirm_reset:
Are you sure you want to reset all data?
All chat rooms, members, and messages will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
reset_done_body: Data cleared. Please restart the application.
room_created_msg: System notice: Room '{room_name}' has been created. Current members: {agent_list}
private_room_topic: This room is for private communication between {name1} and {name2}
